reviews.comment:
Excelente atención....se saca el carnet de conducir internacional...en minutos...
2 fotos carnet ( sin anteojos)... Fotocopia del registro de conducir argentino...luego se abona , varía socio y no socio...
Horario...10 a 16

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service...you can get an international driver's license...in minutes...
2 passport photos (without glasses)... Photocopy of your Argentine driver's license...then you pay, it varies for members and non-members...
Hours: 10 a.m. to 4 p.m.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0cUpMdVVREAE
